category_sources: source_facts.description: alternative to kubectx and kubens; official GitHub README describes context and namespace management for Kubernetes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official GitHub repository title for kubie.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface; source_facts.repo redirects from sbstp/kubie to kubie-org/kubie.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/sbstp/kubie, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub README describes kubie as a more powerful alternative to kubectx and kubens for Kubernetes contexts/namespaces.
